subject_information.address: 49331 Lewis Views Apt. 516, Lake Maryshire, DE 59549

suspicious_activity.narrative: Jacqueline Rodriguez, DOB 2001-02-01, residing at 49331 Lewis Views Apt. 516, Lake Maryshire, DE, engaged in suspicious activity from 2025-07-29 to 2025-07-31. A large incoming wire transfer of $76,517.25 was followed by multiple large outgoing wire transfers totaling $49,517.51. This activity is inconsistent with her occupation as a conservation officer and her reported annual income of $306,379. The transactions occurred through accounts CUST_0111_ACC_1 and CUST_0111_ACC_2. The pattern suggests potential money laundering, triggering mandatory SAR filing under 31 CFR 1020.320 and 12 CFR 21.11.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: High volume of large outgoing wire transfers ($8,906.70 to $14,019.62) following a large incoming transfer ($76,517.25) suggests layering. High risk rating and income mismatch with transaction volume.
